subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-09 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The late Gabriel [Sacy] was a pure believer in the Cause of God, and he composed a treatise to logically prove its truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: جبران مرحوم در امر الله مؤمن خالص بود و یک رسالهٴ استدلالیه در اثبات امر الله نوشت
